requirement: contains all fields needed for next admissible transition
examples: Xi_hat/q/theta/kappa; Yi place carrier; Wilhelm six lines+selected line; monodromy sheet+kappa+history; Shadow orientation/residue vector

requirement: legal transition selected from retained state
examples: Q/B/L; base-8 successor/carry; line flip; branch generator; S/T residue action

requirement: terminal unless it passes transition-complete gate
examples: visible phase; product uv; decimal value; hexagram name/text; sheet only; scalar bilateral shadow

requirement: lift/re-chart preserves the fields required by O
examples: q/theta carry; digit length; selected line; generator action table; orientation channel
